# Celestial Timekeepers
## Scripture
"But you, Lord, sit enthroned forever; your renown endures through all generations. You will rise up and have compassion on Zion, for it is time to show favor to her; the appointed time has come." - Psalm 102:12-13

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial bodies that keep perfect time. The planets orbit, the stars shine, and the moon phases mark the passage of time. But amidst this grand symphony, we find a deeper rhythm - God's appointed time. In Psalm 102, we see that God's timing is not just about the celestial bodies, but about His sovereign plan for humanity. He sits enthroned forever, overseeing all generations, and His renown endures through eternity.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, thank you for being our celestial Timekeeper. Help us to trust in Your sovereign timing, even when our circumstances seem uncertain. Just as the planets and stars move in perfect harmony, may our lives be aligned with Your will. Give us patience and faith to wait for Your appointed time, knowing that Your favor and compassion will rise up at the perfect moment. May we reflect Your renown and glory to all generations, now and forever. Amen.
